nasb.text: You shall thus celebrate it as a feast to the Lord for seven days in the year. It shall be a perpetual statute throughout your generations; you shall celebrate it in the seventh month.

esv.text: You shall celebrate it as a feast to the Lord for seven days in the year. It is a statute forever throughout your generations; you shall celebrate it in the seventh month.

cnv.text: 你們每年七月，要守耶和華這七天的節期，這是你們世世代代永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 在每年七月的这七天，你们要向耶和华守这节期。这是永远不变的律例，你们世世代代都要遵守。
